opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: (Parent calling) My son stepped on a massive piece of rusty wire in the yard, it's stuck deep in his foot, and he is screaming if anyone touches it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened this afternoon in the backyard, I couldn't pull the bit of wire out, and now the spot is going red and puffy and he won't put any weight on that foot.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 6 hours ago — he stood on a piece of rusty fencing wire in the backyard this afternoon
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 hours and the redness and soreness seem to be getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp bit of metal is stuck in the sole of his foot; it's a small hole but the skin around it is going red, puffy and tender
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he screams if anyone touches it and won't stand on it at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the arch of his right foot, on the sole
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant sharp pain, worse with any pressure or touch
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the foot up and completely still; I gave him some children's paracetamol
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to touch it or put weight on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the skin around the spot is getting red and a bit swollen; no fever that I've noticed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he can't walk on that foot at all

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one dose about an hour ago, the amount on the bottle for his weight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: school-aged child, lives with parents; injury happened playing in the backyard; parent is present and made the call

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened parent, wants the object out and worried about the dirty wire

objective_data_offered.value: a small metal shard visibly poking out of a tiny hole in the sole of the right foot, with a patch of red, shiny, puffy skin around it about the size of a 20-cent coin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen over a video call in poor lighting on a squirming child; the depth of the object and the true extent of the redness cannot be judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: parent-sent photo showing the protruding metal fragment and surrounding redness on the plantar arch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single still photo; cannot show depth or tracking of the puncture

objective_data_offered.value: about 37.4 on the home thermometer, no fever
he is tearful and guarding the foot but settles when I hold him; he is alert, talking normally and not floppy or drowsy
the wire came from an old rusty fence in the backyard; I have kept his foot elevated since it happened
